creator: bsd@philippost.de
text:
The issue turned out to be missing firmware files. In addition to gpu-firmware-amd-kmod-beige-goby the following are also required:
gpu-firmware-amd-kmod-dcn-3-1-5
gpu-firmware-amd-kmod-gc-10-3-6
gpu-firmware-amd-kmod-psp-13-0-5
gpu-firmware-amd-kmod-sdma-5-2-6
gpu-firmware-amd-kmod-vcn-3-1-2

I filed Bug 283662 to add these missing firmware files to fwget.

Closing this as "overcome by events".
